overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist exploring a rooftop garden and marble pavilion overlooking ancient Alexandria. The character walks through a landscaped garden with classical statues, enters a circular columned pavilion to survey the city and Pharos lighthouse, then returns through the garden path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop garden with marble planters and statues

agents.ego_description: walking along stone path through landscaped garden with large planters and classical architecture

notable_agents.action: two individuals conversing near a bench beside the path

entered.detail: tall stone pedestal supporting classical statue
large rectangular planter with dense greenery
large rectangular planter with palm plants
tall marble columns forming decorative archway
irregular stone tile flooring in earth tones

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit rooftop garden with stone paving and large planters containing lush greenery. Two NPCs stand conversing near a bench ahead as the character approaches a marble archway leading to a pavilion.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular marble pavilion with city overlook

events.description: character enters circular marble pavilion from garden path

agents.ego_description: walking into the pavilion and approaching the overlook edge to view the city

entered.detail: tall white marble columns supporting circular roof structure
ornate red and gold patterned rugs on marble floor
small wooden table with cushions for seating
dense ancient city with red tile roofs and white buildings
tall white lighthouse on island in the harbor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular marble pavilion with tall white columns, leaving the garden behind. Red decorative carpets cover the floor as the character walks toward the edge where the cityscape of Alexandria and the distant Pharos lighthouse become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation platform overlooking ancient harbor city

events.description: character stops walking and stands to observe the panoramic city view
character pans view right to survey the harbor and lighthouse

agents.ego_description: standing at pavilion edge surveying the cityscape, harbor, and lighthouse while rotating view

entered.detail: flower beds with red blooms along pavilion edge
blue water of the harbor surrounding the lighthouse
decorative clay pots and urns near column bases

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the pavilion's edge observing the expansive view of ancient Alexandria. The camera pans across the cityscape, showing dense buildings with red roofs, the harbor waters, and the iconic Pharos lighthouse as the character surveys the surroundings from this elevated vantage point.

events.description: character exits pavilion and returns to garden path

agents.ego_description: turning away from the overlook and walking back through the garden path lined with statues

entered.detail: tall white marble statue of robed figure on pedestal
tall thin evergreen trees lining the path
building with domed roof visible behind trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the city view and exits the pavilion, returning to the garden path. The scene features classical marble statues, lattice stone walls, and cypress trees as the character walks away from the overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush rooftop garden that opens into a panoramic overlook of ancient Alexandria. It begins with the character walking across sunlit stone paving past large planters and conversing NPCs, moving steadily toward a marble archway. As the character passes through the arch, the garden recedes and the scene shifts into a circular marble pavilion where red decorative carpets lead the way toward the open edge of the structure. The camera then pans across the expansive cityscape, revealing dense red-roofed buildings and the distant Pharos lighthouse towering over the harbor waters. Finally, the character turns away from the vista and exits the pavilion, returning to the garden path among classical marble statues, lattice stone walls, and cypress trees.
